items.title: Automated decision & profiling (3) — European Data Protection Board (EDPB) (EU)
items.why_it_matters: Enforcement/decision case from European Data Protection Board (EDPB). Direct legal precedent for AI governance.
items.governance_value: Demonstrates actual regulatory enforcement patterns. Use for vendor due diligence and compliance gap analysis.
missing_information: Independent curator review of proposed_case_title for neutrality and accuracy.
Legal domain classification confirmation by a qualified reviewer.
Control Tower sign-off on publication timing and risk posture.
